signals.title: Breez lanceert Bitcoin-naar-stablecoin-betalingen op meer dan 30 blockchains
signals.summary: The new SDK feature lets developers route payments from Bitcoin balances to recipients in USDC and USDT without requiring users to hold stablecoins.

signals.title: EBA publiceert ontwerpmethodologie voor boeterollen onder MiCA
signals.summary: ​The European Banking Authority (EBA) published today a Consultation Paper with a draft methodology for setting fines in its role as supervisor under MiCA. The objective is to ensure that fines imposed on issuers of significant crypto-assets are consistent, proportionate and transparent, and effectively support compliance with the regulatory framework.

signals.title: ECB publiceert indicatieve operationele kalenders voor 2028
signals.summary: ECB publishes indicative operational calendars for 2028

signals.title: ECB publiceert indicatieve operationele kalenders voor 2027
signals.summary: ECB publishes indicative operational calendars for 2027

signals.title: Dubai trekt cryptobedrijven aan door MiCA-deadline in Europa
signals.summary: Dubai set for crypto firm influx as MiCA deadline pushes companies to reassess Europe

signals.title: JPMorgan waarschuwt voor risico's van rendement-stablecoins als schaduwbanking
signals.summary: JPMorgan execs argued that stablecoin innovation can easily drift into “shadow banking” if yield payments are permitted.

signals.title: Coinbase, Kraken en OKX trekken EU-gebruikers aan met transferbonussen onder MiCA
signals.summary: Several exchanges that have already been authorized by EU regulators are attempting to bring in users from companies unlicensed under the Markets in Crypto-Assets rules, offering transfer bonuses and prizes.

signals.title: Binance-oprichter: MiCA-aanvraag was bijna goedgekeurd voor politieke inmenging
signals.summary: Binance founder CZ says the exchange's EU MiCA application was close to approval before unnamed political forces weighed in.
